d:
Passive. Phraesto sacrifices [[12%]] of his max HP, summoning an identical Illusion during the preparation stage. This Illusion inherits [[100%]] of Phraesto's stats and can cast all his skills. When both Phraesto and his Illusion are positioned in the same row, they each receive a [[30%]] damage reduction effect, lasting until one of them is defeated.
Active. Phraesto deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 2 tiles, recovering himself [[160%]]<ATK> HP for each enemy hit.
Increases the damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[360%]]<ATK>.

Phraesto and his Illusion each sign a permanent contract with different allied heroes placed [[1 tile behind]] them when a battle starts, reducing the recipient's HP by [[6%]]. Phraesto increases the recipient's Energy Recovery Speed by [[14%]], while the Illusion increases the recipient's DMG Reduction by [[14%]]. The terms of each contract remain undetected by enemies before the battle starts.
Active. Phraesto launches 3 strikes against an enemy in front, dealing [[100%]]<ATK> damage with the first 2 hits and [[140%]]<ATK> damage with the 3rd hit.
Phraesto grants his recipient an extra [[80]] Energy. The Illusion grants the recipient a [[180%]]<ATK> shield for [[6]]s.
Increases the damage of the 3rd hit to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the 3rd hit to [[280%]]<ATK>.

Phraesto stings an enemy in front, dealing [[50%]]<ATK> damage and inflicting them with Paralyzing Venom for [[6]]s. Enemies afflicted with Paralyzing Venom have their Haste reduced by [[30]] and Vitality reduced by [[45]]. They also lose [[2%]] of their max HP per second, while restoring [[3%]] of the caster's max HP per second. Enemy HP loss can't exceed [[40%]] of Phraesto's ATK per second.
Increases the enemy's lost HP per second to [[2.5%]] of their max HP.
Increases the max HP ratio restored per second for Paralyzing Venom's caster to [[4.5%]].
Increases the enemy's lost HP per second to [[3.3%]] of their max HP.
Phraesto increases the Phys & Magic DEF of both himself and his Illusion by [[30%]]. Whenever one of them loses [[10%]] of max HP, the other gains [[15]] Energy.
Phraesto increases the Phys & Magic DEF of both himself and his Illusion by [[40%]]. Whenever one of them loses [[10%]] of max HP, the other gains [[20]] Energy.
Phraesto increases the Phys & Magic DEF of both himself and his Illusion by [[50%]]. Whenever one of them loses [[10%]] of max HP, the other gains [[25]] Energy.
Phraesto taunts the enemy who dealt the most damage if his Illusion is defeated before he is, dealing [[500%]]<ATK> damage and stunning them for [[4.5]]s.
Increases the skill damage to [[600%]]<ATK>.
Increases the skill damage to [[700%]]<ATK>.
Phraesto summons a new Illusion in front of himself if the previous Illusion is defeated before he is. The new Illusion inherits only [[60%]] of Phraesto's max HP. Triggers once at most per battle.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 12 Vitality, 10 Ranged DEF.

d: When both Phraesto and his Illusion are positioned in the same row, they each receive a shield equal to [[570%]] of their ATK when a battle starts, lasting up to [[12]]s.
